summary: 0.6.55 keeps the restored movie scrub session model and rolls only the non-trigger movie scrub rate math back to the 0.6.28 normalized law, so video scrub distance returns to the older feel without changing image stepping or trigger-modified behavior.
operatorSignals: After the 0.6.54 button-5 rollback, image scrubbing worked well again but movie scrub still felt tiny at around 1 to 2 seconds per nudge.
The lane wants a tiny scrub-rate tweak only, not another scrub-model or transport change.
actionsTaken: Compared 0.6.28 directly to the current 0.6.54 CUA input module and confirmed the non-trigger movie scrub lifecycle is the same while the rate math is the only real delta.
Restored the 0.6.28 fixed normalized movie scrub rate inside the current scrub-session model.
Kept the exact seek finalize path, trigger-modified video step path, image stepping behavior, and canonical raw dev_deploy filenames intact.
nonGoals: No slideshow work in this slice.
No right-stick volume, gaze, or scene-builder changes in this slice.
No scrub-model redesign, skip-action substitution, or trigger-path changes in this slice.
